case_title: JULIE DEBELL et al VS. ANDRE LEANDREW DIXON

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2013; JUDGMENT DEBTOR ANDRE LEANDREW DIXON FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. PLAINTIFF AUDRA BLICKENSTAFF WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS JULIE DEBELL AND STUART ILLSON WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDRE LEANDREW DIXON WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEBELL, JULIE ILLSON, STUART BLICKENSTAFF, AUDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIXON, ANDRE LEANDREW $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,385.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
